title: Torilis bifrons
taxonomy: Torilis bifrons belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification is due to the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf structure and the presence of umbels, which are typical features of plants in the Apiaceae family. Further, Torilis bifrons is classified as a species within the genus Torilis, a group of plants that are primarily found in temperate and subtropical regions. The genus Torilis is itself part of the tribe Anthricoseae, which contains plants with similar characteristics. The classification of Torilis bifrons reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Apiaceae family.
